materials: DK yarn in the colour(s) of your choice
A button if you aren’t going to crochet one

rounds.rawInstruction: Starting in the 2nd chain from the hook and working in one side of the chain, work as follows,
rounds.title: Setup

rounds.rawInstruction: 2 HTC in first stitch, 1 HTC in each of the next 8 stitches, 2HTC in the next stitch, working in the other side of the chain, 2 HTC in the next stitch, 1HTC in each of the next 8 stitches, 2 HTC in the last stitch, join to the 1st HTC. You should have 24 stitches in total. Mark the beginning of your round with a stitch marker.
rounds.summary: Work increases around the chain to form a ring of 24 half treble crochets.
rounds.title: Round 1

rounds.rawInstruction: 1 HTC in each stitch all the way around (24)
rounds.summary: Work one half treble crochet in each stitch for five rounds.
rounds.title: Rounds 2-6

rounds.rawInstruction: 1 DC in each stitch all the way around (24)
rounds.summary: Work one double crochet in each stitch around.
rounds.title: Round 7

rounds.rawInstruction: Now we will begin to work the flap, from here on we will be working in rows back and forth.
rounds.summary: Transition to working in rows for the flap.
rounds.title: Begin Flap

rounds.rawInstruction: 1DC, 1DC, CH 2, turn, 1 HTC in the next 10 stitches, CH 2, turn. (10)
rounds.summary: Work two double crochets, chain two, turn, then work ten half treble crochets, chain two, and turn.
rounds.title: Row 1

rounds.rawInstruction: 1 HTC in each stitch all the way across, CH 2, turn (10)
rounds.summary: Work one half treble crochet in each stitch across, chain two, and turn for eight rows.
rounds.title: Rows 2-9

rounds.rawInstruction: Now we will work our button hole.
rounds.title: Begin Button Hole

rounds.rawInstruction: 2HTCtog, 1HTC, 1HTC, CH2, skip the next 2 stitches, 1HTC, 1HTC, 2HTCtog, CH2, turn (8)
rounds.summary: Decrease, work stitches, chain two, skip stitches, work stitches, decrease, chain two, and turn to create button hole.
rounds.title: Row 10

rounds.summary: Work one half treble crochet in each stitch across and fasten off.
rounds.title: Row 11

rounds.summary: Work 12 treble crochets into the magic ring and join.
rounds.title: Round 1

rounds.summary: Slip stitch into each stitch around.
rounds.title: Round 2

rounds.rawInstruction: Line the button up with where the button hole on the flap lies when in position at the front of the pouch, (you can mark this with a stitch marker) and sew into place.
rounds.summary: Position and sew the button onto the pouch body.
rounds.title: Sew Button
